scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix client install --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.mongo:dev:up: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const readMongoUri=()=>{ if(process.env.MONGO_URI) return String(process.env.MONGO_URI).trim(); const p=path.join('server','.env'); if(!fs.existsSync(p)) return ''; try{ const t=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const m=t.match(/^\s*MONGO_URI\s*=\s*(.+)\s*$/m); return m?String(m[1]).trim():''; }catch(e){ return ''; } }; const uri=readMongoUri(); if(uri){ process.exit(0); } const hasDocker=(()=>{ try{ const r=cp.spawnSync('docker',['--version'],{stdio:'ignore',shell:true}); return r.status===0; }catch(e){ return false; } })(); if(!hasDocker){ console.error('[dev] MONGO_URI is not set and Docker is not available.'); console.error('[dev] Fix: create server/.env with MONGO_URI for Atlas, OR install Docker Desktop.'); process.exit(1); } const run=(args)=>cp.spawnSync('docker',args,{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); let r=run(['start','budexpert-mongo-dev']); if(r.status!==0){ r=run(['run','--name','budexpert-mongo-dev','-d','-p','27017:27017','-v','budexpert_mongo_dev_data:/data/db','mongo:7']); } process.exit(r.status||0);"
scripts.mongo:test:up: docker start budexpert-mongo-test || docker run --name budexpert-mongo-test -d -p 27017:27017 -v budexpert_mongo_test_data:/data/db mongo:7
scripts.dev: npm run mongo:dev:up && concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:test: npm run mongo:test:up && npm run seed:test && concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "TEST_ENV=test MONGO_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/budexpert_test PORT=5001 npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.test:api:docker: npm run mongo:test:up && npm run test:api
